title: Implement multi-language shell invocation extraction
description: Extend InlineDetector to parse non-bash inline scripts with language-specific tree-sitter grammars. AST walking for Python (os.system, subprocess), Ruby (backticks, system, exec), JavaScript (child_process), Perl (backticks, system, exec, qx). Extract string args and feed through bash ParseAndExtract. Unit tests per language, negative tests, integration chain tests.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Progress on otc.5 in 3072119: non-bash inline handling now attempts tree-sitter AST traversal (with reconstructed child text) and extracts shell invocations before regex fallback. Added inline tests for python subprocess.run, perl -E system, and lua os.execute. Validation: go test ./... and go test -race ./internal/parse pass.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewer approved commit 3072119 for otc.5. Moving forward to otc.6.
